overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a yellow jumpsuit exploring a makeshift settlement at night. The character observes a creature in a wooden pen before walking along a muddy path and entering a lit building interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift animal pen with wooden fencing

events.description: the penned creature shifts position and moves around inside the enclosure

agents.ego_description: standing near the wooden fence observing the creature in the pen, then beginning to walk forward

notable_agents.action: large pig-like creature pacing inside the wooden pen

entered.detail: wooden fenced enclosure containing a large animal
horizontal log railings forming the pen boundary
tall stacks of yellow-brown wooden crates
blue metal barrel near the fence corner
half-buried tire forming an archway decoration

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a muddy outdoor settlement area at night, observing a large creature pacing inside a wooden pen. The area is lit by artificial lights, with stacks of crates and makeshift fencing visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy pathway between storage crates and buildings

events.description: character begins walking forward away from the animal pen
approaching the lit entrance of a wooden building

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy path past the animal pen and turning toward the building entrance

entered.detail: illuminated doorway leading into a wooden structure
tall wooden shelves holding various supplies

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the pen along a muddy path lined with wooden fences and storage crates. Green bins appear on the right as the character approaches a lit building entrance, passing by exterior shelving units.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior storage room with shelving and supplies

events.description: character enters the building through the illuminated doorway
interior lighting becomes warmer and more enclosed as character moves deeper inside

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the lit interior space, approaching a corridor

entered.detail: doorway leading deeper into the building structure
coiled rope or hose lying on the ground near the entrance
illuminated lantern hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wooden building, passing through the doorway into a warmly lit interior. Inside, wooden shelving lines the walls, a coiled rope sits on the floor, and hanging lanterns provide illumination as the character approaches an interior corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, muddy outdoor settlement into the warm interior of a wooden building. It begins with the character observing a large creature pacing within a wooden pen, surrounded by artificial lights and stacks of crates. As the character turns away, the camera follows them along a muddy path lined with fences and green bins, passing exterior shelving units toward a glowing doorway. The scene then shifts from the cool night air into a warmly lit interior, where the camera glides past wooden shelves and a coiled rope on the floor. Finally, the movement continues under the glow of hanging lanterns as the character approaches an interior corridor.
